name: envi-web
description: ENVI Nord2000 map-authoring frontend (React 19 + Vite + MapLibre). Build/test tooling is devDependencies ONLY — nothing tooling ships in the bundle; the served web/dist is self-contained and fully offline (D-11, zero external assets). Runtime deps (react/maplibre/react-map-gl/terra-draw/zustand/turf) are the only code that reaches the browser.

scripts.build:wasm: cargo build -p envi-gis-wasm --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && wasm-bindgen --target web --out-dir src/generated/wasm --out-name envi_gis_wasm ../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/envi_gis_wasm.wasm
scripts.build:wasm:compute: cargo +nightly-2026-07-11 build -p envi-compute-wasm --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --features threads -Z build-std=std,panic_abort --config "target.wasm32-unknown-unknown.rustflags=['-C', 'target-feature=+atomics,+bulk-memory,+mutable-globals']" && wasm-bindgen --target web --out-dir src/generated/wasm-compute --out-name envi_compute_wasm ../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/envi_compute_wasm.wasm
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:wasm:compute && tsc --noEmit && vite build
